text: Here's what science actually says about fast twitch muscle. Fast twitch muscles are the body's powerhouses, perfect for explosive movements. But did you know they fatigue quickly? That's why sprinters rely on them. Research shows fast twitch fibers can be trained, enhancing performance in short bursts. So, whether you're sprinting or lifting, fast twitch muscles are your secret weapon. Want to learn more about your muscles? Hit that follow button!
